qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unbounded request body size enables resource exhaustion DoS
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding concerns unbounded JSON request bodies and Pydantic/FastAPI resource exhaustion in the Crawl4AI Docker API. Although it names some overlapping endpoints, the root cause and impact are not the advisory-described file:// URL handling that permits local file inclusion.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying finding in the run manifest identifies the advisory root cause: Crawl4AI Docker API endpoints accepting file:// URLs and returning arbitrary local file contents. The manifest qualifying finding covers an unbounded request-body denial of service.
evidence: The advisory describes local file inclusion through file:// URLs accepted by /execute_js, /screenshot, /pdf, and /html.
unbounded_request_body_dos/vulnerability_report.json describes absent request body size limits and resource exhaustion, not file:// URL acceptance or filesystem disclosure.
